title: Social Media Account Transfer
description: Agreement transferring ownership and login credentials of Facebook, Instagram, X, or YouTube accounts.
whatsCovered: Listing of handle names, followers, and social networks
Delivery of admin logins and email resets
Prohibition on seller attempting to recover account using security codes
Purchase price details and escrow structures
Transfer of associated sponsorships and advertising accounts
whenToUse: Use this contract when buying an online influencer account, brand page, or community channel, protecting account transition steps.

clauses.heading: SOCIAL MEDIA ACCOUNT TRANSFER
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Social Media Account Transfer. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Account Admin Logins
clauses.body: Seller transfers account ownership of handles: {social_handles}. Seller shall deliver admin email coordinates and waive recovery rights.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
